items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout uk-undersized-lighting-vs-target example. 48 m² private office (8×6 m); 12 × LED_PANEL_600 at 3500 lm each (value-engineered substitution from the 4500 lm ontology default). Upstream lumen-method already FAILS (achieved 434 < target 500). Photometric verification confirms the failure cascades to per-point: INV-01 FAIL HIGH. Demonstrates failure-mode cascade end-to-end.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, value-engineered 3500lm variant (vs 4500lm ontology default), 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — used to demonstrate the per-point failure cascade for under-spec'd luminaire substitutions.
